title: UX and UI Design Intern (Web)
description:
About DIGIPIXEL

DIGIPIXEL is a Singapore-based digital consultancy focused on web solutions, branding, and performance marketing. We help organisations build digital platforms that are clear, usable, and aligned to business outcomes. Our web work is UX-led, where user journeys, information architecture, and content structure come before visual design and development.

As a UX Design Intern, you will support real client projects and learn how UX is applied in professional web delivery, not just theory.

About the role

We are looking for a UX Design Intern to support us in UX discovery, structuring content, and producing UX deliverables for websites, eCommerce, and web applications. You’ll help turn messy requirements into clear flows and wireframes that the team can build confidently.

This is an internship that requires a minimum commitment of 6 months. Please only apply if you meet this requirement.

What you will do

UX Discovery Support

  • Help with stakeholder notes, requirements, and translating inputs into clear user needs.

  • Assist with competitor and heuristic reviews to identify usability gaps.

  • Support basic user research (simple surveys, interview notes, findings summaries).

Information Architecture and UX Planning

  • Draft sitemaps, navigation structure proposals, and content hierarchy.

  • Create user flows for key journeys (enquiry forms, bookings, sign-ups, checkout).

  • Map page intent: who it’s for, what it needs to achieve, what CTA should be primary.

Wireframes and Documentation

  • Produce low to high-fidelity wireframes in Figma for key pages and templates.

  • Prepare handover materials and proper annotations so UI designers and developers understand the UX clearly.

Team Collaboration

  • Join internal reviews and client calls (when relevant) to learn how UX is communicated.

  • Iterate based on feedback quickly and keep files tidy and structured.

What we’re looking for

  • Student pursuing UX, Product Design, HCI, Digital Media, or related disciplines.

  • Comfortable with structured thinking and detail-oriented work.

  • Able to explain your rationale (even simply) instead of “I feel this looks better”.

  • Basic proficiency in Figma (components not required, but file hygiene matters).

  • Teachable, pro-active, adaptable, and able to handle revisions efficiently.

Nice to have (not required)

  • Any experience with web projects (WordPress, Webflow, Shopify, WooCommerce).

  • Basic awareness of accessibility and usability heuristics.

  • Interest in conversion-focused UX (forms, landing pages, funnels).

What you’ll learn

  • How UX discovery works in real client projects.

  • How to create practical, build-ready UX deliverables (not just pretty wireframes).

  • How to collaborate with UI and dev teams to reduce rework and scope drift.

Internship outcomes (what success looks like)

  • You can produce clean sitemaps, flows, and wireframes with minimal supervision.

  • Your UX notes reduce ambiguity for UI design and development.

  • Your work helps projects move faster with fewer revisions.

postedCompany.description:
Digipixel, located in Kaki Bukit, Singapore, is a Cyber Trust Certified (Tier 2) digital agency and IMDA Pre-Approved vendor under the SMEs Go Digital programme. 


With our Pre-Approved eCommerce solution, eligible SMEs can access up to 50% funding through the Productivity Solutions Grant (PSG). Our services include strategic branding, marketing consultancy, custom web design, ecommerce and software development, all crafted to enhance your brand's reach and security. 


Our strategic branding and marketing consultancy is also eligible for up to 50% support under the Enterprise Development Grant (EDG). 


As a 3-time SME 500 award winner, Digipixel combines creativity with robust security, delivering solutions that protect and perform.
postedCompany.name: DIGIPIXEL PTE. LTD.
